definition.summary: Reclaim disk space from deleted/overwritten needles in volumes whose garbage ratio exceeds threshold.
definition.description: Compacts .dat files in-place. Background-only, never blocks writes. Default threshold 30% garbage matches SeaweedFS recommendation.

params.name: garbage_threshold
params.doc: Vacuum when deleted ratio exceeds this (0..1)

params.name: volume_id
params.doc: Specific volume; omit for cluster-wide pass
